concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: 637 manifested records; 636 retained after moving 3 non-core records out and absorbing 2 phylodynamic misroutes from spatial_regression_geostatistics
concept_decisions.rationale: The manifested set is overwhelmingly sequence-based phylodynamic, genomic-epidemiologic, transmission-cluster, coalescent, and epidemic-history inference rather than a residual bucket of non-genomic spatial transmission models.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: 636 manifested records plus 1 incoming Bayesian phylodynamic spatial-diffusion paper from spatial_diffusion_models
concept_decisions.rationale: This concept is coherent around explicit geographic lineage-movement inference from genomic data, including discrete or continuous spatial diffusion, migration pathways, and spatial ancestral-state reconstruction.

Nine records are Hawkes or latent Hawkes epidemic models and the remaining record is still point-process transmission-flow inference; the broader point-process label matches the actual shared design better than a strict self-exciting-only label.
No manifested records were routed here, so there is no semantic evidence to merge or split it within this batch; it remains a distinct zero-coverage design concept.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Empirical spatial diffusion and spread studies
concept_decisions.labels_compared: spatial_diffusion_models vs reaction_diffusion_epidemic_models vs spatial_regression_geostatistics vs phylogeography_genomic_diffusion
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: 18 manifested records; 8 retained after moving 9 mechanistic reaction-diffusion papers, 1 geostatistical climate-risk mapping paper, and 1 genomic diffusion paper, while absorbing 1 spatial stochastic spread model from spatial_transmission_models
concept_decisions.rationale: The assigned records mix empirical spread-pattern studies with mechanistic PDE/reaction-diffusion epidemic systems. Those have different identification assumptions and estimands, so the mechanistic subgroup should stand apart.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Spatial interpolation and geostatistical risk mapping
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: 3 manifested records; 2 retained after moving 2 phylodynamic genealogy papers out and receiving 1 climate-risk geostatistical mapping paper from spatial_diffusion_models
concept_decisions.rationale: Only the kriging/IDW-style risk-surface mapping records share the geostatistical design; the two genealogy-based phylodynamic papers belong with genomic transmission inference instead.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: 39 manifested records; 20 retained after moving 13 threshold/segmented-regression papers and 6 transmission-rate changepoint epidemic-model papers
concept_decisions.rationale: One subgroup detects outbreak onsets, offsets, or surveillance shifts in observed series; another estimates structural thresholds in regression or laboratory settings; another estimates piecewise transmission changes inside epidemic models. Those are distinct design families.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: 515 manifested records; 388 retained after moving 27 HIV drug-resistance EWI papers, 95 clinical early-warning score/biomarker papers, and 6 critical-transition EWS papers, while absorbing 1 endemic/epidemic transition forecasting paper from spatial_transmission_models
concept_decisions.rationale: The retained core is population-level outbreak anticipation using surveillance, climate, digital, wastewater, or vector data. HIV program-monitoring indicators, patient-level deterioration scores, and theoretical critical-transition warning signals are semantically different concepts with different estimands.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Spatial interpolation and geostatistical risk mapping
reassignments.rationale: Climate/regression/IDW risk-surface mapping rather than diffusion-pattern analysis.
Bayesian phylodynamic spatial-diffusion inference from viral sequences, not empirical case diffusion study.
Coalescent/phylodynamic genealogy inference rather than geostatistical regression or interpolation.
Coalescent/phylodynamic genealogy inference rather than geostatistical regression or interpolation.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Empirical spatial diffusion and spread studies
reassignments.rationale: Spatial stochastic spread model integrating mobility, vector, climate, and demography rather than genomic/phylodynamic inference.
Endemic/epidemic transition forecasting using early-warning indicators rather than genomic transmission inference.
Condom access implementation study; semantically unrelated to phylodynamic or spatial-transmission modeling.

new_concepts.rationale: These studies monitor ART program performance indicators used to prevent or detect emergent HIV drug resistance, which is a treatment-monitoring design rather than outbreak anticipation.
These records estimate patient-level deterioration, sepsis, mortality, complication, or treatment-risk signals using scores, laboratory markers, or clinical prediction models.
These papers study generic early-warning indicators for regime shifts or tipping points in dynamical epidemic or behaviour-disease systems rather than operational surveillance systems.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Threshold and segmented regression change-point models
new_concepts.rationale: These records use change-points as structural thresholds in regression, laboratory cut-off estimation, or longitudinal modelling rather than for outbreak onset detection.
These papers embed changepoints inside epidemic curve or transmission-rate models to estimate intervention or phase-shift effects.
These records are mechanistic PDE or reaction-diffusion epidemic systems with explicit diffusion operators, distinct from empirical spatial spread studies.
The condom-card implementation paper is a behavioral access intervention evaluation and does not share the inferential structure of any retained batch concept.

concerns: border_discontinuity_designs had zero manifested records, so this batch cannot supply positive semantic evidence for or against its future retention.
PMID:25712070 was a clear semantic outlier relative to the manifested batch and required a singleton intervention concept rather than forced assignment to a transmission-method bucket.
